title: Jasper Creatives
subtitle: Social Media Visual Identity
overview: This project involved the design of a comprehensive social media grid for Jasper Creatives, a multi-disciplinary service agency. The primary goal was to establish a professional yet approachable brand presence that communicates a wide range of services—including Graphic Design, Content Creation, and Social Media Management—through a consistent visual language.
problem: A multi-disciplinary agency needs a versatile visual identity that can represent diverse service offerings without feeling fragmented or inconsistent across different content types.
solution: A professional yet approachable social media grid built on a consistent visual language. Warm amber-gold tones balanced with clean layouts to communicate creativity, reliability, and versatility across all service lines.

features.title: Comprehensive Social Media Grid
features.description: A full social media grid establishing a professional yet approachable brand presence across all platforms.

features.title: Multi-Service Visual Language
features.description: Consistent visual system representing Graphic Design, Content Creation, and Social Media Management services.

features.title: Brand Cohesion
features.description: Unified design language ensuring all service offerings feel part of one cohesive brand identity.

results.description: Social media graphics and brand assets
Amber-gold palette with clean, approachable layouts
